name: aespa
description: aespa is a unique K-Pop group featuring both real members and virtual AI avatars, known for their futuristic concept and powerful performances.

funFacts: Was famous as 'Glass Bead Girl' pre-debut
Known for her 'cute giant baby' personality off-stage
Her real name Jimin means 'wisdom' in Korean
Dating rumors with Lee Jae-wook were confirmed in 2024
One of SM's most talented all-rounders
members.bio: Karina is aespa's leader and the group's ultimate all-rounder. Despite her fierce on-stage persona, she's known as a 'giant baby' for her cute, friendly personality. She trained at SM for years and was famous even before debut.

popularSongs.title: Black Mamba
popularSongs.note: aespa's debut single where Karina's lead-rap framed the SMCU concept.

popularSongs.title: Next Level
popularSongs.note: Title where Karina's pre-chorus 'I'm on the next level' line went viral.

popularSongs.title: Savage
popularSongs.note: Lead single from Savage EP that anchored Karina's center moments.

popularSongs.title: Drama
popularSongs.note: Title where Karina's choreography break drives the song's bridge.

members.distinction: Unlike other aespa members, Karina leads main-dance and lead-rap simultaneously — an ESFJ's group-first instinct that lets her direct stage formations while still hitting the camera as center.
members.fandomChant: MY chant 'Yoo Jimin!' through her rap verses and tend to whisper 'next level' during the iconic pre-chorus.

members.realName: Aeri Uchinaga (内永愛里) / Uchinaga Aeri
funFacts: Half Korean, half Japanese
Born and raised in Tokyo, Japan
Fluent in Japanese, Korean, and English
Had the shortest training period in aespa (11 months)
Known for her unique fashion sense and style
members.bio: Giselle is aespa's main rapper and the only member who is half-Japanese. Despite having the shortest training period, her natural talent and trilingual abilities have made her invaluable. She's known for her stylish fashion and friendly personality.

popularSongs.title: Black Mamba
popularSongs.note: Debut single where Giselle's rap break introduced her trilingual flow.

popularSongs.title: Spicy
popularSongs.note: Title from MY WORLD where Giselle's rap fronts the chorus drop.

popularSongs.title: Supernova
popularSongs.note: Lead single from Armageddon where Giselle's hook delivery became the song's identity.

popularSongs.title: Armageddon
popularSongs.note: Title track where Giselle's rap bars carry the cinematic build.

members.distinction: Unlike other aespa members, Giselle moves between Japanese, Korean and English mid-line — an INFP's softness translated through a rapper's pen, which is why her verses scan as personal letters rather than aggression.
members.fandomChant: MY chant 'Aeri Uchinaga!' through her rap section and break out the 'supernova' bridge sing-along on tour.

funFacts: Born on January 1st - literally a New Year's baby
Known for her baby lion-like visuals
Has a surprisingly deep, husky voice
Very introverted but opens up to members
Her stage name reflects her cool, mysterious image
members.bio: Winter is aespa's visual and lead vocalist known for her fairy-like visuals and powerful voice. Born on New Year's Day, she brings a mysterious, cool charm to the group. Despite her cold stage name, she's warm with her members.

popularSongs.title: Next Level
popularSongs.note: Title where Winter's bridge into the bass-drop became a karaoke staple.

popularSongs.title: Forever
popularSongs.note: Solo cut where Winter's huskier register carried the ballad.

popularSongs.title: Drama
popularSongs.note: Title where Winter's chorus melody anchors the song.

popularSongs.title: Whiplash
popularSongs.note: Title where Winter's pre-chorus delivers the song's pivot.

members.distinction: Unlike other aespa members, Winter pairs visual-line duties with a deeper husky tone — an INFP's introversion that reads on camera as composed mystery, which is why her solo cuts feel like quiet centerpieces.
members.fandomChant: MY chant 'Kim Minjeong!' through her solo lines and whisper 'snowflake' during her ad-libs at fan meets.

funFacts: Born in Harbin, China
Known for her extraordinary vocal range and power
Has a '4D' personality - playful and unpredictable
Trained at SM since 2016
Her high notes are considered legendary
members.bio: Ningning is aespa's main vocalist and maknae from China. Her powerful vocals and impressive range have made her one of the best 4th generation vocalists. Despite being the youngest, her confident and playful '4D' personality makes her stand out.

popularSongs.title: Savage
popularSongs.note: Title where Ningning's high note in the bridge anchored the EP's reception.

popularSongs.title: Welcome to MY World
popularSongs.note: Title where Ningning's belt frames the song's drop.

popularSongs.title: Drama
popularSongs.note: Title where Ningning's hook delivery carries the chorus.

popularSongs.title: Whiplash
popularSongs.note: Title where Ningning's vocal break gives the song its release.

members.distinction: Unlike other aespa members, Ningning combines main-vocal power with maknae playfulness — an ENFP that swings between technical belts and variety-show punchlines, which is why her livestream cuts go viral as fast as her stages.
members.fandomChant: MY chant 'Ning Yizhuo!' during her belt sections and tend to clap along to her ad-libs in the chorus tail.

seo.title: aespa Name Generator | Create Your Korean Name with MY
seo.description: Create your aespa name with Karina, Giselle, Winter & Ningning! Instant chemistry scores & Korean stage names. Perfect for MY fanfiction.
